content:
## Config
## Server Integration

### New REST endpoints

```
POST /v1/context    — context-only mode (R+A)
POST /v1/ask        — full RAG mode (R+A+G)
```

Request body (shared):
```json
{
  "query": "How does authentication work?",
  "scope_id": "project-alpha",
  "limit": 10,
  "expand_graph": true
}
```


### New MCP tools

```
corvia_context   — context-only (returns assembled context + sources)
corvia_ask       — full RAG (returns generated answer + sources + trace)
```
